markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Marcel's idea for a new content strategy and SEO offering, and get feedback from Rich on what would be valuable for his company.](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel is exploring offering a content strategy and SEO roadmap service to help companies grow organically](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Rich sees value in this for his company as they lack a solid content strategy but don't have bandwidth to do the research/planning](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [The offering could include competitive analysis, keyword research, content roadmap, persona research, and some execution guidance](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Rich suggests having different pricing tiers (full package vs. a la carte options) and providing an example of how to execute on a keyword](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Proposed Offering

  - [Competitive analysis to identify keyword opportunities competitors are missing](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Keyword research and clustering to build a roadmap of 300-400 content topics/keywords to target](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Research into target personas, their questions/concerns, and best way to speak to them](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [High-level content outlines or templates for execution guidance](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)

### Rich's Feedback

  - [Sees a lot of value in this for his company as they lack a dedicated content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Suggests having pricing options (full package vs. individual components)](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [An example of how to execute on a keyword (title, meta description, outline) would be very helpful](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [The strategy/roadmap is the most valuable part, so be careful how much is given away](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)

### Potential Pricing Model

  - [Charge for the full research/strategy package ($2k-$8k estimated by Rich)](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Or a la carte pricing for individual components](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Rich to provide his valuation after seeing the full draft](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to put together a draft of the full offering for Rich](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Rich to provide case studies, personas, and any other helpful context](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [Discuss pricing and delivery after reviewing the draft](https://fathom.video/share/9ExXzsfmddf_QTq6-dYc1e9T1JTC3xJL?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
